new_claims.claim_text: China is preparing to supply Iran with MANPADs, potentially via third countries.
new_claims.notes: CNN, citing US intelligence, reports China is preparing to supply Iran with MANPADs. China's embassy denies this.

new_claims.claim_text: Canadian Liberal Party is proposing to force Canadian workers to pay $500,000 to work in the USA.
new_claims.notes: Web search found no evidence supporting this claim; appears to be unsubstantiated.
